description_long: This is a large, modern multi-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, modular design. The exterior is predominantly white with extensive use of glass for large windows and sliding doors, creating a bright and open appearance. A prominent feature is the spacious outdoor swimming pool, surrounded by a patio area with outdoor furniture and landscaping, including several palm trees. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, providing ample outdoor living space on both the ground and upper levels. The entryway is grand, with a wide staircase leading up to the main door, flanked by symmetrical landscaping. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on indoor-outdoor integration.
description: A large, modern multi-story house with flat roofs, expansive glass windows, a swimming pool, and palm landscaping. The design is geometric and open, emphasizing contemporary luxury.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry staircase, large windows, pool, and patio area with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the pool, patio, and the modular arrangement of the house's volumes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical window placement, upper balconies, and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle showing the pool, terraces, and the layered structure of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Wide central staircase leading to a large glass door, flanked by landscaping and a covered porch area
